'''Cattena Squadron''' was a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] unit [[Garrison/Legends|based]] at the [[Carida Academy/Legends|Academy of Carida]] on the planet [[Carida/Legends|Ord Carida]].

==History==
[[Brenn Tantor|Brenn]] and [[Dellis Tantor]] began to shadow the unit after having failed to be accepted into the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]]. Impressed by their dedication, Cattena's [[Captain/Legends|captain]] allowed the two to join the unit as "honorary stormtroopers". Though controversial, this decision went unchallenged. Cattena Squadron served in the [[Battle of Kalaan]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. During that battle, one of the squadron's [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeants]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] and Brenn Tantor took command of his unit. Brenn's performance in that role drew the attention of Captain [[Beri Tulon]], who recruited Brenn for the [[Battlefield Holographic Control Interface|BHCI]] project, taking Dellis, who had been wounded in the battle, with him.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
